Backdrop Stand Hardware Features for Professional Trade Show Setup

This large banner frame (Slider) is a great alternative to standard pop up backwall displays. The Slider frame can adjust from an 81" to 120" width & 41.5" to 96" height display. Pole pockets are sewn on top and bottom of the fabric print. The frame is constructed out of 1.5" telescopic poles that slide, allowing multiple graphic sizes to be used on the display.

Frame Color: Black

Package Includes:

  • (1) Single Sided Graphic
  • (2) 4 1/2" Pole Pockets (Top and Bottom)
  • (1) Large Slider Frame
  • (1) Black Nylon Carry Bag

Upgrade Option: Add 2 additional pole pockets to sides

Warranty: 1 Year on Frame

Display Specifications:

  • Display Size: 96"W x 96"H
  • Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H
  • Shipping Size: 41" x 5" x 4"
  • Banner Materials: Stretch Fabric, Dye-Sublimation
  • Weight: 16 lbs

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

Backdrop Stand Assembly Instructions & Setup Guide

Setup Instructions Download

Download PDF Setup Instructions

Assembly Overview

  • Tool-Free Setup: No additional tools required for frame assembly
  • Quick Installation: Professional backdrop ready in under 10 minutes
  • Adjustable Display: Frame adjusts to accommodate various graphic sizes
  • Stable Foundation: Wide base provides secure trade show display

Artwork File Requirements

  • File Format: High-resolution PDF, AI, or EPS files preferred
  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum at actual print size
  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate printing
  • Bleed Area: 0.125" bleed on all sides for trimming

Design Specifications

  • Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H finished graphic dimensions
  • Pole Pocket Areas: Account for 4.5" pole pockets top and bottom
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text 2" from pole pocket areas
  • Color Matching: Pantone color matching available upon request

Frequently Asked Questions About Backdrop Stand Hardware

What banner sizes work with this backdrop stand frame?

The telescopic frame adjusts from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height, accommodating various banner sizes. The standard package includes a 96"W x 94"H banner with pole pockets.

How much does the complete backdrop stand package weigh?

The complete package weighs 16 lbs including the frame, banner, and carrying case. The compact shipping size is 41" x 5" x 4" for easy transport.

Can I order replacement banners for my existing frame?

Yes, replacement banners can be ordered separately. The frame accommodates different banner sizes within the adjustment range, allowing you to create multiple graphics for the same hardware.

What is included with the backdrop stand hardware purchase?

The complete package includes: telescopic frame, custom printed stretch fabric banner, black nylon carrying case, and one-year warranty on frame components.

How long does production take for backdrop stand hardware?

Production times range from 5-7 business days depending on your selected option. Rush production may be available - contact customer service for expedited timeline options.

Are the side pole pockets worth adding to my backdrop stand?

Side pole pockets create a four-point tension system for enhanced stability and allow for wraparound graphic designs. They're recommended for larger displays or outdoor use.

What file format should I use for my backdrop banner artwork?

High-resolution PDF, AI, or EPS files work best. Files should be 150 DPI minimum at actual size (96"W x 94"H) in CMYK color mode with 0.125" bleed.
